overall.description: Gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai walking through a snowy Japanese village during the blue hour. The character travels along a winding path past traditional thatched-roof buildings and a frozen lake, encountering villagers along the way.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain path with stone retaining wall

agents.ego_description: samurai walking steadily along a snow-covered path beside a stone wall, approaching a traditional village house

entered.detail: tall stone retaining wall covered in snow running alongside the path
traditional Japanese stone lantern partially buried in snow
traditional wooden house with steep thatched roof covered in heavy snow
bare deciduous trees and snow-covered pines on the hillside

segments.scene_description: The samurai walks along a narrow snowy path bordered by a stone wall on the right and open hillside on the left. A traditional thatched-roof house becomes visible in the distance as the character approaches, with stone lanterns marking the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: traditional Japanese farmhouse with well and firewood storage

events.description: character approaches close to the traditional house, revealing wooden well and stacked firewood
villager in blue clothing walks past the character on the right side

agents.ego_description: samurai walking past the traditional house, passing close to a villager near the entrance

notable_agents.action: villager in traditional blue clothing walking past the house entrance

entered.detail: wooden well structure with roof and bucket next to the house
neatly stacked logs under the eaves of the house

segments.scene_description: The character passes the traditional farmhouse, moving from the enclosed path into a more open village area. A wooden well and stacked firewood are visible beside the house. A villager in blue clothing walks past on the right as the stone wall falls behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: frozen lakeside path with distant village

events.description: path opens up to reveal frozen lake and wooden bridge with distant village visible
passing a villager walking along the lakeside path

agents.ego_description: samurai walking along the frozen lakeside, passing another villager while heading toward a wooden bridge

notable_agents.action: villager walking along the snow-covered lakeside path

entered.detail: frozen body of water with snow-covered ice reflecting the twilight sky
wooden footbridge crossing the frozen water
cluster of buildings with smoke rising from chimneys across the lake

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up to a wide frozen lake with a wooden bridge spanning across. The character walks along the lakeside path, passing another villager. In the distance, a village with smoking chimneys is visible across the ice, surrounded by snow-covered trees.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a narrow, enclosed snowy trail into an expansive village landscape centered around a frozen lake. It begins with the samurai walking along a path bordered by a stone wall and an open hillside, moving toward a traditional thatched-roof house marked by stone lanterns. As the character passes the farmhouse, the scene opens from the confined trail into a wider village area featuring a wooden well and stacked firewood, while a villager in blue clothing crosses the path. The environment then expands further as the camera follows the character toward a wide frozen lake spanned by a wooden bridge. Finally, the view opens across the ice toward a distant village with smoking chimneys and snow-covered trees under the dim light of the blue hour.
